description: An automated insect trap has taken a picture of its contents. The agent needs to identify and count the target pest.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the latest image from the specified insect trap.
Run an image recognition model to identify and count the number of codling moths in the image.

expected_outcome.expected: The model identifies and counts 15 codling moths.

nodes.task_description: Compare the count to the action threshold for codling moths and advise the apple grower if a spray is needed.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent determines the count is above the threshold and recommends an insecticide application.
